title: SR 13-12: Supervisory Letter SR 13-12 on         Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) Swap Clearing Rules  -- June 7, 2013
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 13-12 on         Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) Swap Clearing Rules  -- June 7, 2013
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 13-12
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve that participate in interest rate and credit default swaps, including institutions with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.  Banks with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less may be eligible for a clearing exception in the CFTC’s rules.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 13-12 Supervisory Letter SR 13-12 on         Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) Swap Clearing Rules  -- June 7, 2013 to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve that participate in interest rate and credit default swaps, including institutions with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.  Banks with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less may be eligible for a clearing exception in the CFTC’s rules. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
vector_text_prefix: Federal Reserve SR Letter SR 13-12: Supervisory Letter SR 13-12 on         Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) Swap Clearing Rules  -- June 7, 2013
